Tattoo Rituals & Trainings

In my private studio in Zurich I tattoo by hand, without a machine — calm, ritual, held. Whether you choose a shamanic flash tattoo from my collection or a complete Tattoo Ritual with a personal Power Symbol — every line is placed with intention. What remains on your skin is more than a design.

Book Tattoo Ritual
Book Flash Tattoo
Apply for Training

YOUR TATTOO WITH SPIRITUAL CONNECTION

Handpoke Tattoo Ritual

Imagine your body becoming the vessel of a Power Symbol that supports you on your life's journey.

In my private studio in Zurich, I tattoo by hand, without a machine — a method that is less painful and gentler on your nervous system.

Your tattoo is more than just a design. It's a ritual experience, deeply connected to your life and your intentions. At the beginning, you tell me a little about yourself, your story, what the tattoo means to you, and where you would like it placed.

On a shamanic journey, I then connect with Spirit and the ancient wisdom of symbols. From this, a unique Power Symbol emerges, one that accompanies you on your life's path.

Your energy, wishes, and intentions flow into the final form of the Power Symbol, imbuing it with a special strength.

On the day of your Handpoke Tattoo Ritual, we take time for a personal meditation tailored to your Power Symbol. Your Tattoo Ritual begins with an Aura cleansing, which centers you completely within your energy field. The end is held by the activation of the Power Symbol, which now reflects your personal strength.

During the Tattoo Ritual, we focus entirely on your intentions for this initiation.

FROM CHF 550.– including personal Power Symbol

Mini Tattoo (up to 5cm / 2.5×2.5cm): CHF 550.–
Midi Tattoo (up to 10cm / 5×5cm): CHF 660.–
Maxi Tattoo (up to 20cm / 15×15cm): CHF 770.– to CHF 2’200.–
Wanna Do’s, Large projects and Starguide Tattoos: On request

Book Tattoo Ritual now

Payable in cash or by bank transfer.

I tattoo from April to December – 8 appointments per month, spread over 4 days.

  • Atmosphere
    The Sihl River flows alongside the road leading to the studio, trees lining the path. Many of my clients say that something begins to come down inside them as soon as they turn the corner. The room is high-ceilinged and quiet, with a skylight casting soft light onto the couch. Warm colors, no distractions. The candle is burning. The space is open.

    Address & Information
    The Heart Collective
    Lessingstrasse 13
    8002 Zurich
    Switzerland

    The studio is a private place without a waiting area – arriving on time means we can open the space together.

    Route Map

    • There are no parking spaces available – only at the Sihlcity parking garage, about a 15-minute walk from the studio. The parking garage is not expensive – for 1 - 2 hours it costs CHF 4.50. Here you find the parking prices overview.

    • Public transport: Take the bus to Sihlcity, Nord or Giesshübel – from there it’s a 10-minute walk to the studio.

CLIENT VOICES

  • "I was so excited all week and couldn’t wait. Now I’m just happy – my Symbol is exactly right, just as it is. Perfect."

    Jocelyn, 22

  • "Your work exceeded my expectations. Everything feels so aligned – even my daughter is symbolically included. Thank you for your clarity and depth!"

    Ramon, 32

  • "I love how the lines support one another – each detail holds meaning. The Symbol feels alive, something I’ll continue to discover over time."

    Rebecca, 37

  • "I instantly felt the Symbol in my heart. It feels like it’s always been a part of me – powerful, familiar, true."

    Gabriela, 49

  • "I’m deeply touched. The witch, the sorceress, the dryad – I see them all reflected in me. So beautiful and magical!"

    Corina, 44

  • "Thank you so, so much! My Symbol is amazing – you captured me perfectly. It will have a place of honor in my practice."

    Francesca, 34

  • "I’m surprised by how deeply the Symbol resonates. There’s so much within it – I’ll take my time uncovering all it holds."

    Catherine, 49

  • "My Symbol is stunning. I can feel the love within it – it makes me feel joyful like a child. Thank you, Dada!"

    Carmen, 24

  • "At first I was unsure – then deeply moved. The love, the triangles, the square – so much wisdom. I carry it in my heart."

    Ladina, 41

  • "Everything you included, just from my birth date, reflects me perfectly. I feel such a strong connection – thank you for this powerful, precise creation."

    Timea, 31

  • "It’s like a print of my soul – I’m speechless. Magical, true, and so beautiful."

    Michèle, 26

  • "My Power Symbol fits me so well. It gives me trust, focus, and grounding. I’ll keep it visible, as a compass for my path."

    Wilma, 42

  • "As I connected with the Symbol this morning, I felt warmth and strength right away. It’s beautiful – your work is a true gift."

    Esther, 49

  • "Tears of joy came to my eyes when I saw it. The Symbol lights up my inner self – full of love, truth, and soul depth."

    Heidi, 45

  • "I was completely blown away – my Symbol is so fitting, so moving. It holds everything that matters to me."

    Rahel, 31

  • "As soon as I saw it, a wave of primal energy flowed through me. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for bringing it to life!"

    Deborah, 33

  • "My Symbol is stunning and full of power – it’s awakened something in me. I’m excited for the journey that lies ahead."

    Sandra, 39

  • "You brought everything together into one image – my words, my chart, my essence. I’m amazed."

    Laura, 26

  • "I was overjoyed! I feel truly seen in this Symbol – it will accompany me from now on."

    Tamara, 45

  • "I was overwhelmed when I opened your email. You saw me, even though we’ve never met. Thank you from my heart."

    Monica, 44

  • "The Symbols gave names to things I had felt for so long. I feel grounded and connected – between sky and earth."

    Janine, 34

  • "I work with alchemy, consciousness, the elements – your Symbol fits perfectly into my world."

    Barbara, 30

  • "So much depth in just a few lines. The Symbol centers me, aligns me – my quiet companion on this path."

    Anja, 28

  • "I’m deeply moved. Even my healer friend tested it and was impressed. Deep respect for your mastery."

    Margrit, 43

  • "At first, I just thought ‘pretty’ – then I read the meaning. It’s exactly what matters to me. Getting it tattooed soon!"

    Conny, 46

  • "The tree, the unified horoscopes – just wonderful. I keep discovering new things. Thank you for your time and energy!"

    Sandra, 43

  • "Tears came to my eyes – it’s simply perfect. Thank you for doing such meaningful work. I’m deeply grateful."

    Cindy, 42

  • "The flowing lines, the stars, the Symbols – my heart responds to all of it. The Symbol radiates with power. Thank you for this magical creation."

    Kirsten, 34

  • "Only after looking a few times did I fully sense its strength. I’ll use it in rituals and meditations, and carry it with me."

    Myriam, 36

  • "I knew instantly: this is mine. And the more I sit with it, the deeper its effect becomes. I’m in awe."

    Magdalena, 41

  • "From the first moment, it captivated me – and your description fit perfectly. I’m truly grateful for your work."

    Daniela, 35

  • "Woooow!!! I can’t stop looking at it. My Symbol is powerful, radiant, and full of love. Thank you a thousand times over!"

    Marianne, 44

  • "I see myself clearly in it. The theme of awakening especially resonates – it’s been with me for years. Thank you for capturing that."

    René, 42

  • "From the first moment, I felt deeply connected to it. I now wear the Symbol on my forearm – with pride and gratitude."

    Cindy, 36

  • "During the tattoo, I saw through my third eye – my wings grew, my moon Symbol shone. I feel grounded and held."

    Melanie, 48

  • "The tattoo is healing beautifully. The ritual with you set things in motion. I’m so grateful our paths crossed."

    Sabine, 37

Item 1 of 36

SHAMANIC POWER SYMBOLS — RECEIVED, NOT CREATED

Flash Tattoos

Not every path begins with a personal shamanic journey. Sometimes a Power Symbol simply draws you in — and that is equally valid.

In the flashbook you will find a selection of shamanic Power Symbols that I have developed through my many years of working with energies, archetypes, and the Spirit world. They are bookable at a fixed size and a fixed price — no long lead time, directly with an appointment.

How it works

  • You browse the flashbook and choose a Power Symbol that speaks to you.

  • You book your appointment directly — no form, no waiting for a shamanic journey.

  • On the day of your appointment, I tattoo your chosen Power Symbol by hand, ritually accompanied. Activation is included.

Flash tattoos are exact reproductions — the chosen motif is tattooed exactly as it appears in the flashbook. No modifications. This is intentional: These Power Symbols are complete exactly as they are.

CHF 220.– | Size 5 CM

Book Flash Tattoo now

Payable in cash or by bank transfer.

I tattoo from April to December – 8 appointments per month, spread over 4 days.

  • Atmosphere
    The Sihl River flows alongside the road leading to the studio, trees lining the path. Many of my clients say that something begins to come down inside them as soon as they turn the corner. The room is high-ceilinged and quiet, with a skylight casting soft light onto the couch. Warm colors, no distractions. The candle is burning. The space is open.

    Route Map

    • There are no parking spaces available – only at the Sihlcity parking garage, about a 15-minute walk from the studio. The parking garage is not expensive – for 1 - 2 hours it costs CHF 4.50. Here you find the parking prices overview.

    • Public transport: Take the bus to Sihlcity, Nord or Giesshübel – from there it’s a 10-minute walk to the studio.

MASTER HANDPOKE TATTOOING

Learn handpoke from the ground up — technical, spiritual, ritual.

In the Spiritual Handpoke Tattoo Training you learn everything you need to tattoo by hand — technically, anatomically, and spiritually. You learn how to place lines and dots with precision, which materials you work with and where to source them. You also receive solid knowledge of hygiene, anatomy, official guidelines and legal foundations, as well as the metaphysical significance of different body locations.

At the same time, I introduce you to the spiritual dimension: the history of ritual tattooing, how to open and hold space during a ritual, the activation of a tattoo, and energetic cleansing afterwards.

Under my personal guidance you practice directly on yourself — a ritual experience that connects you with your body in a new way. No prior knowledge required.

You receive

  • 5-day workshop with personal guidance (11am–6pm each day)

  • Continuous online mentoring throughout your learning process

  • The complete spiritual, anatomical and technical knowledge for personal tattoo rituals

SPIRITUAL HANDPOKE TATTOO Training

CHF 5’550.–

Apply for Tattoo Training now

Payable in cash or by bank transfer.

    • Duration: 5 days (from 11 am to 6 pm)

    • Location: Online or on site in Zurich, Switzerland

    • Date: You can book the five days either in a row or individually - I am flexible when it comes to scheduling.

    • Booking: The training will take place as soon as a place has been booked. Once I have received your application, I will contact you to arrange the dates together.

    • Content: The history of tattooing, The different types of handpoke tools, Spiritual background, Tattoo design creation, Anatomy, Workplace hygiene, Official guidelines and legal principles, Opening and maintaining space before and during the tattoo ritual, The handpoke tattoo technique (lines, dots, shading), Tattoo motif activation, energetic demarcation, and cleansing of the space after the Tattoo Ritual.

Reflections from the training

  • "Handpoke is slow, quiet, and sacred. These Symbols hold ancient knowledge. Dada gave me everything I needed. A big thank you!"

    Pippi Loup, 38

  • "I felt very comfortable in the group. The course was enriching on many levels. I'm excited to dive deeper – thank you for this perfect foundation."

    Sara, 27

  • "Dada’s workshop was a gift. In just a few days she taught everything about handpoke – and even more: she brings you closer to yourself."

    Rahel, 30

  • "It was amazing! Not just the technique, but also the origins, meanings, body regions – all explained with love and clarity."

    Michèle, 27

  • "The course was incredibly insightful. I never imagined I’d pick up the technique this well. Thank you, Dada, for sharing your knowledge with us!"

    Remo, 32

  • "The handpoke training was magical – full of knowledge, clarity, and depth. Dada gave me the foundation I needed and will continue to guide me. Thank you for everything!"

    Lea, 30

Item 1 of 6

TATTOO RITUALS & SPIRITUAL TATTOO TRAINING

FAQ

  • A Power Symbol is a custom, energetically charged design created through deep listening, intuition, and your personal intention. Each Symbol is unique and acts as a guide, protector, or reminder – carrying the essence of what you wish to embody or release. It’s more than decoration: It’s a living talisman for your journey.

  • The Power Symbols arise from a co-creative process. I tune into your energy, story, and answers to a few simple questions. From there, I channel the form – often weaving together ancient archetypes, natural patterns, and intuitive marks. No two Symbols are ever the same.

  • Handpoke (also called stick and poke) is a traditional, machine-free tattoo method. Dots and lines are placed one by one – allowing the process to be slow, sacred, and deeply intentional. This method invites presence, connection, and calm.

  • Most people find it gentler. The slower pace gives the nervous system time to relax, and the spiritual intention behind the session often shifts the way pain is experienced.

  • Please arrive on time and come alone – no pets or accompanying persons are allowed in the studio. The studio is a private, quiet space — this stillness is intentional and part of the ritual. Take good care of your skin in the days leading up to your appointment to prepare it properly. Also, avoid taking blood-thinning painkillers like Aspirin or Ibuprofen, as they can negatively affect the tattooing process and healing. On the day itself, we begin in a quiet, sacred space – grounding, aligning, and allowing your energy to guide the experience. Come well-rested, nourished, and with an open heart.

  • Absolutely. A symbolic tattoo can be a powerful gift. If you’d like to book a session or order a custom Power Symbol for someone else, just let me know their name, date of birth and intention (or leave it open – I can also work intuitively for them).

  • No — flash tattoos are exact reproductions of the motifs from the flashbook. This is intentional: these Power Symbols are complete exactly as they are. If you want a motif that belongs to you alone, the Tattoo Ritual including a personal Power Symbol is the right path.

  • Yes. A flash tattoo is also set by hand and concluded with an activation of the Power Symbol. The process is leaner than the Tattoo Ritual, but conscious and present.

  • With a flash tattoo you choose a Power Symbol from my collection — bookable directly, no form, no waiting. With the Tattoo Ritual, I receive a Power Symbol in a shamanic journey that is created solely and exclusively for you. Both are set by hand and ritually activated.

  • Yes. In the Spiritual Handpoke Tattoo Training you will learn the technique and spiritual depth of tattooing in five days. From hygiene and needle guidance to energy work, body symbolism and somatic awareness - you will be guided safely and attentively. Part of the training is tattooing yourself as a ritual experience. You can find all the details about the training, its content, and how to book it further up on this page. I'm happy to answer any questions you may have.

  • No prior tattoo experience is necessary – only a clear intention to learn and respect the craft. I guide you step by step, from technical skills to the spiritual foundations.

  • No. I’ll show you how the technique works through Runes – but I won’t teach you how to design your own Power Symbols.

  • For Power Symbols, I create your design based on your energy and intention. If you have something personal you want to integrate, we can discuss how to bring it into the process without losing the sacred flow.

  • Sessions and Trainings are held in a calm, private space designed for transformation and reconnection in Zurich. You can find the address and map route on the contact page.

  • No – this is a spiritual and intuitive process, rooted in energy work, ritual practice, and ancient traditions. It’s open to all backgrounds and beliefs.

Your power symbol is not the end – it is the beginning. In the Chi Tribe, you learn to live in this energy.
